content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Legacy0cover.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' series begins June 2006.]]

A list of events in '''2006''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 4|04]] – [[Republic 81|''Republic'' 81]] published.
*[[January 11|11]] – [[Republic 82|''Republic'' 82]] published.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]] published.
*25 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]'' published.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Len Carlson]] dies.
*[[January 27|27]] – "[[The Clone Wars: The Pengalan Tradeoff]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] (hardcover) published.

==February==
*[[February 3|03]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 4 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Empire 39|''Empire'' 39]] published.
*08 – [[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] published.
*[[February 9|09]] – [[Phil Brown]] dies.
*[[February 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[February 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[February 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' published.
*15 – "[[The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War]]" published.
*[[February 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' released.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]] published.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]] published.
*22 – ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Five: Allies and Adversaries]]'' published.
*[[February 24|24]] – [[Attack on Endor|''Star Wars Miniatures: Attack on Endor'']] released.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]'' daily webstrip begins.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Empire 40|''Empire'' 40]] published
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic/Rebellion flip-book]]'' published.
*[[March 6|06]] – The webcomic ''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' begins its release.
*[[March 29|29]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 3|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 3]] published.
*29 – ''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]'' published.
*29 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, the Final Truth]]'' published.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Konami|Konami Digital Entertainment]] is founded.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' published.
*[[April 12|12]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'' released.
*12 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5]]'' published.
*12 – [[Rebellion 1|''Rebellion'' 1]] published.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 4|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 4]] published.
*26 – ''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]'' published.
*[[April 28|28]] – "[[A Certain Point of View (short story)|A Certain Point of View]]" republished on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 87|''Star Wars Insider'' 87]] released.

==May==
*[[May 6|06]] – ''[[Routine Valor]]'' published.
*[[May 17|17]] – [[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]] published.
*[[May 19|19]]-[[May 21|21]] – The seventh [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[May 25|25]] – First celebration of the [[Wikipedia:Nerd Pride Day|Nerd Pride Day]], honoring the premier of "[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]" back in [[1977]].
*[[May 26|26]]-[[May 28|28]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Paul Gleason]] dies.
*[[May 30|30]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' (hardcover) published.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 5|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 5]] published.

==June==
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] shipped to subscribers round early June.
*[[June 2|02]]-[[June 4|04]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1]]'' published.
*07 – [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] published.
*[[June 9|09]]-[[June 11|11]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*11 – [[Tim Hildebrandt]] dies.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] published.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Rebellion 3|''Rebellion'' 3]] published.
*[[June 21|21]] – [[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] published.
*[[June 26|26]] – ''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] begins.
*[[June 27|27]] – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' published.
*27 – ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' mass market paperback reprint with ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' excerpt published.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 6|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 6]] published.
*?? – ''[[Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]'' daily webstrip concludes.

==July==
*[[July 5|05]] – [[Dark Horse Twenty Years]] published.
*[[July 12|12]] – [[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] published.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Rebellion 4|''Rebellion'' 4]] published.
*[[July 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 9: Endgame]]'' published.
*26 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] published.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Johnny Weissmuller Jr.]] dies.
*[[July|??]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] shipped to subscribers.

==August==
*[[August 15|15]] – ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' published.
*[[August 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6]]'' published.
*[[August 29|29]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' published.
*[[August 31|31]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' Round 6 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] published.

==September==
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Original unaltered trilogy]] [[Star Wars home video releases|DVDs]] released.
*12 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'' released.
*[[September 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II Second Edition]]'' published.
*13 – [[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]] published.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] released.
*[[September 26|26]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' released.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]] shipped to subscribers.

==October==
*[[October 11|11]] – [[Legacy (2006) 4|''Legacy'' (2006) 4]] released.
*11 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2]]'' released.
*[[October 16|16]] – ''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] concludes.
*[[October 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' released.
*[[October 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Six: In the Shadows of Their Fathers]]'' released.
*25 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]] released.
*[[October 31|31]] – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Legacy (2006) 5|''Legacy'' (2006) 5]] released.
*[[November 6|06]] – ''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]'' webstrip begins.
*[[November 7|07]] – The webcomic ''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' concludes.
*[[November 8|08]] – [[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] scheduled for release.
*8 – ''[[Tag & Bink Were Here]]'' scheduled for release.
*[[November 11|11]] – [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3|PlayStation 3]] released.
*[[November 17|17]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' released.
*[[November 19|19]] – [[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] released.
*[[November 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Best of PC]]'' released.
*[[November 22|22]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]] scheduled for release.
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Starship Battles|''Star Wars Miniatures: Starship Battles'']] released.
*[[November 28|28]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' released.
*[[November 29|29]] – [[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 91|''Star Wars Insider'' 91]] shipped to subscribers and published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – Voting concludes for the [[Darth Who Contest]].
*01 – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' published.
*[[December 6|06]] – [[Rebellion 5|''Rebellion'' 5]] released.
*[[December 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' released for [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PSP]]
*[[December 13|13]] – ''Star Wars: Lethal Alliance'' released for [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]]
*13 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 1: Commencement]]'' released.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 11|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 11]] released.

==Unknown==
**''[[EndTimes trilogy]]''
***''[[EndTimes: The Heart|The Heart]]''
***''[[EndTimes: The Hand|The Hand]]''
***[[EndTimes: The Eye|''The Eye'']]
*''[[Star Wars: Imperial Ace]]'' video game published by [[THQ|THQ Wireless]].

----
